mechanism: If the S&P 493 is already in positive correlation territory while the cap-weighted index appears to oscillate near zero, the true required ERP for the broader market is higher than headline measures suggest. The mega-cap concentration masks the regime-conditional overvaluation of the equal-weight market.
regime_dependence: Depends on the unverified hypothesis that S&P 493 correlation is materially more positive than cap-weighted. Becomes more relevant as concentration increases.
